triage.summary: Local config is present, but the Grocy live read probes did not complete successfully.

nextActions: Confirm the configured baseUrl points at the intended Grocy instance and is reachable from this machine.
Confirm the configured API key still has read access for the current health probes.
Rerun npm run grocy:health:diagnostics after the connectivity or permission issue is resolved.
